name: Minty Cucumber Soup
recipeIngredient: 7 small cucumbers, peeled, halved and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 6 of the cucumbers into 1-inch pieces.
2. Cut the remaining cucumber into 1/4-inch dice and reserve.
3. Combine the 6 peeled and diced cucumbers with minced garlic in a food processor and process for 30 seconds.
4. Add chicken broth, yogurt, salt, white pepper, mint leaves, lemon juice, and reserved diced cucumber to the food processor. Process until smooth.
5. Pass the mixture through a food mill or fine mesh strainer into a mixing bowl.
6. Chill the soup in the refrigerator, covered, for 3 hours.
7. To serve, ladle the chilled soup into individual bowls.
8. Garnish with radishes, reserved diced cucumber, and a sprig of mint.
9. Serves 6.
